item.title: Is UN the best option to resolve Cambodia-Thailand maritime dispute?
item.description: UN conciliation to resolve the OCA dispute between Cambodia and Thailand would not be legally binding

item.description: Cupet draws latest target as Trump continues to turn up heat on Caribbean nation

item.description: Oilfield contractor, which maintained a presence in country, signs long-term agreement to help modernise aging oil infrastructure

item.description: US president said he is intent on seizing Iran's oil infrastructure 'much like we have with Venezuela'

item.description: Floating LNG terminal in Stade will start operations in September after two-year delay
